話說「亞洲神童」章魚城，Sorry，打錯，張如城先岩，消聲匿跡五年之後重出江湖，推出全新單曲《紅日之火》，英文名《RedSunFire》後震撼樂壇，獨步天下嘅舞姿，技驚四方，令香港樂壇重現生機！

不過，各位股壇中人，咪以為城城復出只會令花生指數急升，實情張如城係「股壇核彈」！唔係嚇你：

2001年6月－張如城出道：
當時年紀小只是十三歲嘅城城，以主打曲《真愛是真》打響名堂，6月開始更喺TVB《宣傳易》、巴士車身狂落廣告，行到邊都見到城城俊朗嘅身影！

結果：2001年9月發生「美國911」事件，恒指6月至9月間，三個月內最多累積跌33%，見全年低位！

2008年8月－張如城復出：
失跡多年嘅城城，沉寂一時，終於有新歌派台－《友誼的光彩》！「Together！Together！To……gether！」三個字，振奮人心，令全中國上下，都一齊感受到北京舉辦奧運嘅光榮！

結果：2008年出現金融海嘯！全球人類股災Together！恒指8月至10月間，三個月內最多累積跌53%，再一次見全年低位！

2011年8月－張如城二度復出：
城城小休三年後，再有新歌《中國的巨龍》派台，高音甜，低音準，每當迷惘之際，聽一次HugeDragon，即時正能量100分！

結果：美國債務上限危機爆發股災，令好唔容易由金融海嘯復甦嘅股市再次暴跌，港股8月至10月間，三個月內最多累積跌28%，再一次、冇錯！又再一次見全年低位！

「亞洲神童」章魚城，每次出現，環球股市必出事，而且三個月內見全年低位呢個準繩度係達100%！如果城城威力真係咁驚人，以4月恒指收市21067點計，即係恒指喺「‪章魚效應‬」下，7月會見全年低位，假設跌三成，即係恒指會見14746點！！！各位睇路啦！

replies.msg: It's a good bet that you vacation in Japan at Christmas since the Japanese yen has fallen rapidly in the past three months. If so, I highly recommend you take the airport express at IFC. It's very easy. Once you're at the IFC exit where you can head straight for Queen's Road Central, enter IFC, pass the escalator in front of you and keep walking until you come to another escalator. Go down it, turn left and go straight ahead. It's there. If you wanna go to Shinjuku from Tokyo station, go through the gate, go down the escalator and look at the signs. You'll see which side is bound for Shinjuku. If you wanna have a coffee at J.Cafe, take the elevator to level four, go straight down the path and go past several shops until you come to an intersection. Turn right and It's there. If you wanna take a lift to a higher floor, turn left at the intersection and pass several shops until you see Pure Fitness on your left. Enter Pure Fitness and the elevator is there. I enjoy visiting the annual winter carnival where I eat sushi and go on the thrill rides, soaking up the nice Christmassy atmosphere. The sunlight has been dazzlingly hot so you might just as well have a good long soak in an outdoor onsen, soaking up the sun. In fact, ice just got out of an onsen, toweled off and am getting dressed. However, if you ask me if Australia is a good place to go for your holidays, I wouldn't bet on it. There's nothing worth doing there. I like Japanese culture and food. I even took the JLPT at N two level. My writing far outshines my reading so the marks I gained in writing offset those I lost in reading. My friend took the test too. She's a little weak in listening but strong in speaking so the marks she lost in the listening part were offset by the marks she gained in the speaking section. After the test, we spent money on clothes and shoes like it was going out of fashion. We entered a casino and gambled like it was going out of fashion. If you enjoy being in Japan, you might spend money on food and Cisneros products like it's going out of fashion. If you go to a casino, you might gamble like it's going out of fashion like we did.
I've just got out of a jacuzzi and am drying myself on a towel.

微軟現在推出的帶外數據的 “緊急”更新，旨在補救那些使用 KB4598298 或 KB4601315 補丁影響帶來的缺陷。

緊急更新補丁是 “KB5001028”，它不帶有任何其他變化。這個補丁只對受影響的用戶推出，它包括修復面向解決藍屏死機錯誤 nwifi.sys , 當用戶連接到 WPA3 Wi-Fi 網絡時會遇到。

I find the Japanese culture very different than our culture. We enjoy yum cha while they enjoy drinking green tea at bars, soaking up the atmosphere rather than at home. My Japanese friend Jeremy is a Taurus whereas his girlfriend is an Aquarius. He's faithful to his girlfriend and would never cheat on her. When he broke up with his ex, he was pushed over the edge. Even when a stranger talked to him, there was a definite edge of hostility to his voice. But as soon as he had a new relationship target, it took the edge of his emotional upset. His ex is a swimming champion who easily outshines us in any swimming styles. She's tall and lean who certainly has the edge over lots of swimmers. Recently, Jeremy was in a brawl with a guy who was hitting on his girlfriend. The police showed up later and assigned jealousy as the motive for the brawl. Last Tuesday, Jeremy and his girlfriend dined in a restaurant in a hotel which is midway between his place and the post office. They waited in line outside the restaurant for nearly an hour. The line was so big that it stretched from the counter through the lobby area and out the main entrance of the hotel. A stout man tried to push in midway through the line but was caught. Last Thursday, Jeremy and I met at a midway point between my place and his then he took me to the shuttle bus bound for his place. A group of people was in the way near the bis stop so he said "Excuse me." The queue was so huge, stretching down the road to the furthest minibus stop. We lined up for half an hour until three shuttle buses came along at once. Meanwhile, some people mistook this long line for the line for other places. A couple came up and asked "Are you in the line for The Harbourside?" as they wanna be sure that it's the right line. A burly guy cut in line at the head of the line. Later, a petite lady jumped the line. The svelte lady behind her said "Excuse me. The end of the line is back there." A slender guy stood beside a well-rounded and curvaceous woman who was at the tail of the line. While pretending to look at his phone, he edged furtively beside her who didn't realize he was there. Some people might have noticed it but ignored it. Jeremy seemed on edge. It turns out that he has a job interview next week. Never has he felt so on edge before an interview. His elder brother is currently a head chef at a five-star hotel and feels he's found his niche. His elder sister has also found her niche as a professor, having worked as a researcher for three years. She sometimes takes a nap at lunchtime because she has so much work to do that she feels drained. She usually snoozes on the sofa by the fireplace or at her desk when everyone else's eating lunch outside. She once brought her work along with her to the library where she dozed off at the table. Having a doze especially by the fire is a marvelous way to replenish your energy though. His younger brother has just completed his PhD at Peking University and is on the way to becoming a professor. China is on the way to becoming the world's strongest economy. His younger sister is robust and healthy. She does lots of strength and conditioning exercises in her robust sneakers. After the gym sessions, she usually drinks a cup of robust coffee or a glass of robust wine. She lives in Japan where the economy and the political system are robust. His eldest brother has opened an antique shop which made a favorable impression on me. There's an exquisite antique which engages me. I bet you that the store engages a lot of passers-by. I formed a great impression of the store. Jeremy's uncle has recently passed away at the age of ninety nine. I send my sincere condolences to his uncle's family. Jeremy's friend Leonard said "My condolences on the loss of your uncle." His mom also offered her condolences to his family. His dad wrote "Our condolences go to his family." Jeremy's hadn't heard from his cousin for years until last Saturday when he received a call from her.
